name: Howling Wolf
subject: animals/wolf
prompt: a gray wolf sitting on a rocky outcrop with its head tipped back and muzzle pointed up, howling, eyes closed, a thick bushy tail curled at its side, a large round full moon glowing behind it

name: Standing Gray Wolf
subject: animals/wolf
prompt: a proud gray wolf standing in profile on all four legs, alert pointed ears, a long fluffy coat, a bushy tail held low, looking off into the distance with a calm watchful expression

name: Cute Wolf Pup
subject: animals/wolf
prompt: a chubby baby wolf pup sitting on its haunches with big round sparkly eyes, oversized floppy ears, a soft fluffy coat, a little tongue out and a happy playful expression

name: Running Wolf
subject: animals/wolf
prompt: a strong wolf mid-stride at a full run, body stretched forward, legs reaching out front and back, tail streaming straight behind, mouth slightly open, fur swept back as if moving fast

name: Wolf Pack
subject: animals/wolf
prompt: a small pack of three wolves standing close together as a family, one tall adult in front and two slightly smaller wolves beside and behind it, all facing the same direction with alert ears

name: Wolf in the Forest
subject: animals/wolf
prompt: a wolf walking through a pine forest, tall evergreen trees on either side, a few ferns and rocks near its paws, soft ground underfoot, ears perked and head turned slightly toward the viewer

name: Arctic Wolf in Snow
subject: animals/wolf
prompt: a fluffy arctic wolf standing in a snowy landscape, an extra-thick winter coat, rounded ears, a few falling snowflakes around it, small snowdrifts and a bare little tree behind

name: Wolf Face Close-Up
subject: animals/wolf
prompt: a close-up portrait of a wolf's face and shoulders, large expressive almond-shaped eyes, pointed upright ears, detailed fur around the cheeks and ruff, a calm intense gaze looking straight ahead

name: Friendly Cartoon Wolf
subject: animals/wolf
prompt: a friendly cartoon wolf sitting and waving one paw, a big happy smile, round cheeks, simple chunky body shapes, large ears and a fluffy curled tail, looking cheerful and approachable

name: Wolf Howling at Mountains
subject: animals/wolf
prompt: a wolf standing on a high ridge with its head raised to howl, layered mountain peaks rising in the background, a few scattered pine trees below, a crescent moon and a couple of clouds in the sky

name: Wolf Mom and Pup
subject: animals/wolf
prompt: a gentle mother wolf lying down with her small pup snuggled against her side, the mother lowering her head to nuzzle the pup, both with soft fur and warm loving expressions, a little grass and a rock nearby

name: Playful Wolf Pup with Ball
subject: animals/wolf
prompt: a young wolf pup crouched in a play-bow with its front paws down and rear up, batting at a round ball in front of it, ears flopped forward, tail wagging, a bright mischievous expression
